error.same_switch: The heating and cooling switch must be different entities.
error.min_max_runtime: The minimum run time must be shorter than the maximum run time.
error.ddz_too_large: The Dynamic Dead Zone must not be larger than the span between minimum and maximum target temperature.

user.title: Create Acalor Thermostat
user.description: Climate entity with separate heating and cooling setpoints, controlling two switches via a temperature sensor.

data_description.target_sensor: Temperature sensor that reflects the current temperature.
data_description.heater: Switch entity that drives the heating output.
data_description.cooler: Switch entity that drives the cooling output. Heating and cooling are never active at the same time.
data_description.dead_zone: Minimum gap that must always remain between the heating and cooling setpoint (cooling setpoint >= heating setpoint + DDZ).
data_description.heat_on_tolerance: Heating turns ON when the temperature drops this far below the heating setpoint.
data_description.heat_off_tolerance: Heating turns OFF when the temperature rises this far above the heating setpoint.
data_description.cool_on_tolerance: Cooling turns ON when the temperature rises this far above the cooling setpoint.
data_description.cool_off_tolerance: Cooling turns OFF when the temperature drops this far below the cooling setpoint.
data_description.resolution: Step size used for all temperature values.
data_description.start_delay: Delay before an output is switched on. After the delay the demand is re-evaluated and only acted on if it still holds.
data_description.mode_change_delay: After a mode change (including OFF) the plant keeps running for this long before anything is switched. Switching back within this time cancels it - prevents the plant from reacting to brief, accidental mode taps.
data_description.min_cycle_duration_heat: Once heating is on, the minimum time before it may switch off.
data_description.min_cycle_duration_cool: Once cooling is on, the minimum time before it may switch off.
data_description.max_cycle_duration: Once an output is on, the maximum time before it is switched off.
data_description.keep_alive: Periodically re-send the switch command so devices do not lose their state.

error.same_switch: The heating and cooling switch must be different entities.
error.min_max_runtime: The minimum run time must be shorter than the maximum run time.
error.ddz_too_large: The Dynamic Dead Zone must not be larger than the span between minimum and maximum target temperature.
